value.body:
## Context

Labels, users, and templates are critical planning metadata but should not require manual file edits or one-off API calls.

## Outcome

Repository settings provide management screens for labels, users, and issue templates.

## Acceptance criteria

- Labels can be created, edited, colored, archived, and shown in ticket pickers.
- Users can be created/updated and selected as assignees.
- Templates can be created, edited, archived, previewed, and selected from issue creation.
- Management screens share reusable UI components and field validation.
- Tests cover API mutations, cache invalidation, and renderer mapping.

frontmatter.title: Build labels, users, and templates management screens

value.title: Build labels, users, and templates management screens
